---
title: "William Harris"
---

## William Harris

**Dates:** (fl.24 Sept 1846)

### Description

no relation to the chief constable

### Biography

He and his wife were entertained at Puslinch in 1846.  He was probably William Harris, J. P., of Yealmpton, near Puslinch, and his wife, née Bulteel.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
